assumptions: The financial asset is within the scope of IFRS 9 interest recognition and impairment requirements.
The issue concerns a debt-type financial asset for which the effective interest method is relevant.

approaches.label: Effective interest method
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context sets out the effective interest rate framework for allocating amounts over the life of a financial instrument, including amortisation of fees and recalculation of carrying amounts using the original or revised effective interest rate.

approaches.label: Expected credit loss model
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context sets out IFRS 9 impairment as discounted cash shortfalls, including measurement for credit-impaired assets and discounting expected cash flows using the applicable effective interest rate.
